# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, develop ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main, develop ]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'
  CACHE_VERSION: v1

jobs:
  setup-and-cache:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache node_modules
        id: cache-node-modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        if: steps.cache-node-modules.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: npm ci

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pip packages
        id: cache-pip
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            venv
            .venv
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: steps.cache-pip.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Cache configuration files
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .eslintcache
            .stylelintcache
            .prettier-cache
            .cache
            tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/.eslintrc*', '**/.prettierrc*', '**/tsconfig.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-

      - name: Cache build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            out
            .next
            public/build
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-

  test-node:
    needs: setup-and-cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        environment: [development, staging, production]
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Restore configuration cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .eslintcache
            .stylelintcache
            .prettier-cache
            .cache
            tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/.eslintrc*', '**/.prettierrc*', '**/tsconfig.json') }}

      - name: Cache environment-specific config
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .env.${{ matrix.environment }}
            config/${{ matrix.environment }}.json
            secrets/${{ matrix.environment }}
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-env-config-${{ matrix.environment }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('config/**', '.env.*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-env-config-${{ matrix.environment }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Run tests
        env:
          NODE_ENV: ${{ matrix.environment }}
        run: npm test

  test-python:
    needs: setup-and-cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore pip cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            venv
            .venv
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock') }}

      - name: Cache pytest cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            .pytest_cache
            .coverage
            htmlcov
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pytest-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pytest-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Run Python tests
        run: pytest

  build:
    needs: [test-node, test-python]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore all caches
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}

      - name: Restore build cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            out
            .next
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Build project
        run: npm run build

      - name: Cache Docker layers
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: /tmp/.buildx-cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-buildx-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-buildx-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-buildx-
